description_long: This figure depicts a highly stylized humanoid with exaggerated, elongated limbs and a faceless head, dressed in a form-fitting outfit. The upper body is clad in a tight, long-sleeved top with a high collar, while the lower body features fitted pants with visible seam and pocket details. The arms are dramatically extended, ending in sharp, blade-like appendages that replace the hands, giving the figure a surreal, almost mechanical appearance. The legs are also elongated and bent in a dynamic, mid-motion pose, with the feet wearing athletic-style shoes. The overall form is slender and angular, with a sense of movement and tension throughout the body. The color palette is dominated by pink, black, and beige tones, with some red accents on the pants.
description: A surreal, faceless humanoid with elongated limbs, blade-like arms, and athletic shoes, dressed in a fitted top and pants. The figure is posed dynamically, with a striking mix of pink, black, and beige colors.
description_view_0: Front view shows the faceless head, extended arms with blade-like ends, and the dynamic, twisted posture.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the extreme length of the arms and legs, as well as the sharp, angular pose.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back of the fitted top, the curvature of the spine, and the asymmetrical leg positioning.
description_view_3: Right side view emphasizes the bent legs, the athletic shoes, and the dramatic extension of the right arm.
attribute_clothing_type: fitted long-sleeve top and slim pants with athletic styling and blade-like arm extensions
attribute_posture: dynamic, mid-motion with exaggerated limb extension
